case_title: FONTANINI GREG A VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $493.79 FILED BY FONTANINI GREG A AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
